title: Speech-Language Pathology Assistant
description: Pfizer is seeking a Speech-Language Pathology Assistant to support therapeutic services and patient care. You'll assist with patient assessments, deliver therapeutic activities under supervision, and maintain patient records. Work onsite in Omaha for a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to breakthrough innovation.
responsibilities: Assist speech-language pathologists with patient assessments and treatment
Implement therapeutic activities and exercises with patients
Maintain accurate patient treatment records and documentation
Prepare treatment materials and organize therapy spaces
Support patient motivation and therapeutic goals under supervision

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; SLP assistant certificate or coursework preferred
skills: Patience and ability to motivate patients
